content: Sales coaching manager dashboards (Gong, Revenue.io, Attention, Avoma): expected features = automated AI scorecards per conversation against customizable rubric, rep scorecards + leaderboards, per-rep trend lines, team comparison pages, conversion stats tied to coached behavior, drill-down from score to transcript with targeted feedback on specific moments, topic/objection tracking, coaching ROI over time. Generative scorecards (AI grades every conversation automatically, not sampled) are the current standard.
